steps.title: Clear fractions
steps.content: Multiply both sides by $148cx$ to remove denominators: $$148=cx^{2}+148x \implies cx^{2}+148x-148=0.$$

steps.title: Apply the one-solution condition
steps.content: For exactly one solution, the discriminant is $0$: $148^{2}-4(c)(-148)=0$, so $21904+592c=0$ and $c=-37$. The answer is -37.
